quests.name: Charsi's Imbue
quests.description: After recovering the Horadric Malus, Charsi can imbue a single magical item with rare power. Bring her a normal item of your choosing.

objectives.description: Hand a normal item to Charsi.

quests.name: Kashya's Recruit
quests.description: After avenging the Sisters at the Burial Grounds, Kashya offers to lend you one of her Rogue Scouts as a mercenary.

objectives.description: Hire a Rogue Scout from Kashya.

quests.name: Cain's Gratitude
quests.description: For freeing him from Tristram, Cain offers to identify your unidentified items free of charge for the rest of your journey.

objectives.description: Speak with Cain in the Rogue Encampment.

quests.name: Gheed's Gamble
quests.description: The merchant Gheed loves a wager. Spend gold on his gambling stall five times for a chance at a guaranteed magical item.

quests.name: Whispers of the Cow King
quests.description: Stories whisper of a Secret Cow Level. Transmute Wirt's Leg with a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube to open a moo-ving portal.

objectives.description: Open the Secret Cow Level portal.

quests.name: Greiz's Roster
quests.description: Greiz, captain of the Lut Gholein guard, offers Desert Mercenaries to those who have proven themselves against the sewer dwellers.

objectives.description: Hire a Desert Mercenary from Greiz.

quests.name: Fara's Favor
quests.description: Fara, the former Paladin, will repair your gear at a discount after you've cleansed Radament's filth from the sewers.

quests.name: The Lost Caravan
quests.description: Elzix's caravan was ambushed in the Far Oasis. Recover his strongbox from the bandit camp.

objectives.description: Recover the strongbox in the Far Oasis.

quests.name: Drognan's Tome
quests.description: The sage Drognan asks you to recover a sun-cult tome from the Lost City. He will reward you with a tome of arcane learning.

quests.name: Horazon's Lockbox
quests.description: Rumor speaks of a hidden lockbox left by Horazon in the Arcane Sanctuary. Find it and bring its prize back to Atma.

quests.name: Asheara's Iron Wolves
quests.description: Asheara, captain of the Iron Wolves, offers her elemental mages as mercenaries to those willing to brave the Kurast jungle.

objectives.description: Hire an Iron Wolf from Asheara.

quests.name: Alkor's Experiment
quests.description: Alkor wants ingredients from a giant spider in the Spider Cavern for his alchemical experiments. Bring him fresh venom glands.

quests.name: Jade Figurine Buyer
quests.description: Meshif's contacts in Kurast Bazaar are buying jade trinkets at a premium. Sell three jade artifacts to him for a tidy sum.

quests.name: Ormus's Charm
quests.description: Ormus, troubled by visions, asks you to slay corrupt fetish shamans deep in the Flayer Dungeon. He grants you a small enchanted charm in return.

quests.name: Tyrael's Blessing
quests.description: Having freed Izual's soul, Tyrael grants you an extra skill point and reflects upon Heaven's regret for the Fallen Angel.

quests.name: Jamella's Stockpile
quests.description: The angelic merchant Jamella will gladly trade rare gems for crafting reagents you collect from Hephasto's forge.

quests.name: Halbu's Soulwork
quests.description: Halbu, the angelic armorer, offers to socket a piece of armor for those who shattered Mephisto's soulstone.

quests.name: Larzuk's Hammer
quests.description: Larzuk the smith will socket one of your items as thanks for breaking Shenk's siege.

objectives.description: Bring an item to Larzuk to socket.

quests.name: Anya's Gift
quests.description: After her rescue, Anya gifts you a personalized scroll of resistances and unlocks her unique-item stock.

quests.name: Qual-Kehk's Warband
quests.description: Qual-Kehk offers Barbarian warriors to fight at your side after the freed prisoners return to Harrogath.

quests.name: Malah's Elixir
quests.description: Malah brews an elixir that permanently raises your vitality. Bring her ingredients from the Glacial Trail.

quests.name: Nihlathak's Treasure
quests.description: Cain suspects Nihlathak hid a relic in the Pit of Acheron deep within the Halls of Anguish. Recover it.
